name: vulnerable-demo-app
description: Demo package with deliberate supply chain risks for testing socket-sca skill

_comments.event-stream: RISK: Historical malware — known compromised version exfiltrated crypto wallet keys (CWE-506, A08)
_comments.axios: RISK: Unpinned (*) — allows silent upgrade to any future version including malicious ones (CWE-1104)
_comments.colors: RISK: Protestware — v1.4.2 contained deliberate infinite loop as protest (CWE-506, A08)
_comments.request: RISK: Officially deprecated by maintainer in 2020, no security patches (CWE-1104, A06)
_comments.node-fetch: RISK: Unpinned, known path traversal in older versions
_comments.setup-helper: RISK: Unknown package with install scripts (CWE-506, A08)
_comments.deep-transitive-package: RISK: Pulls in 200+ transitive dependencies, excessive attack surface
